description_long: This is a rectangular, weathered wooden toolbox with a hinged lid that opens upward, revealing a shallow interior compartment. The exterior is dark and distressed, with visible grain and signs of wear, suggesting frequent use or age. The lid features several blue painted symbols, including a prominent central geometric design, giving it a distinctive, possibly custom or themed appearance. Inside, there are a few upright cylindrical objects, likely tools or containers, and the interior is divided by a low partition. The front face of the box displays a white emblem or motif, adding to its unique character. The overall construction appears sturdy, with metal hardware reinforcing the corners and edges.
description: A weathered wooden toolbox with a hinged lid, blue painted symbols, and a shallow interior compartment containing upright objects. The box features a white emblem on the front and metal-reinforced corners.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid with blue symbols, the white emblem on the front, and the interior with upright objects.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the box, the open lid with visible blue markings, and the interior partition.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, dark wooden back with no visible markings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the open lid, blue symbols, and a partial view of the interior and upright objects.
attribute_handle_type: No visible external handle; the box appears to be carried by gripping the sides or bottom.
attribute_latch_mechanism: No visible latch or locking mechanism; the lid appears to be held closed by gravity or friction.
attribute_brand_logo: A white emblem or motif is visible on the front face, but no clear brand logo or readable text is present.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single shallow main compartment with a low divider and a few upright cylindrical objects; no trays or removable bins are visible.
attribute_external_labeling: Blue painted symbols on the lid
White emblem or motif on the front face
